creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
This is duplicate of ports/177667. I analyzed the issue and there is no 
way to disable java in configure script (except of removing java part 
alltogether) - it will try to build the java binding uncoditionally if 
java presense is detected. Next version of mapserver changed it's build 
infrastructure to cmake, and there is an option to disable java.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

T.O.S. Of Reality
